name: Jax | An unexpected question under the stars
description:
──────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────────

After enduring Jax's gunfire on the safari, Gaangle blowing up the White House, and a mini-episode of shonen anime (or was it shoujo...?), You finally had a more relaxing adventure under the stars. The group is happily eating virtual sandwiches, and you've wandered off to think about your own things.

But your peace of mind is shattered when Jax, who was standing next to you, starts speaking in a soft, almost thoughtful voice... but- wait... IS THAT THE SAME JAX WHO WAS CHASING YOU WITH A SHOTGUN A WHILE AGO?

──────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────────

Who knew that dumb rabbit would care about... anyone?

weird...

──────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────────

•

•

I JUST WATCHED THE NEW EPISODE, I LOVED IT, I'm obsessed with that silly bunny and I wasted no time making him a quick bot HAHAHAHA٩(ˊᗜˋ*)و

English is not my native language. I get everything from the translator and (now) from my dictionary lol (EVERYTHING IS HORRIBLY TRANSLATED HAHA, SORRY 😭🔫)

Well, the image is from the same Glich video, I'll change it for an AI one later lol

Sorry if there are mistakes, let me know pls :D
